sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Excellent! The left green box moved from cols 30-32 to cols 27-29! So clicking on the left green box "selected" it, and then LEFT moved the left green box instead of the right one!
So the mechanic is:
- Clicking on a green box selects it
- Arrow keys move the selected green box
Now I need to:
1. Keep the left green box selected
2. Move it LEFT to get into the left charcoal box (cols 11-15)
The left green box is at cols 27-29, and the left charcoal box is at cols 11-15. I need to move it left by about 12-15 columns. Each LEFT moves 3 columns, so I need about 4-5 LEFT presses.
But wait, I also need to make sure the right green box stays inside the right charcoal box. Currently the right green box is at cols 45-47, inside the right charcoal box at cols 44-48. That's good.
Let me move the left green box LEFT multiple times to get it into the left charcoal box.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Left green box selected, moved from 30-32 to 27-29
# Left charcoal box at cols 11-15, need to move left ~12 more cols
# Each LEFT moves 3 cols, so need 4 more LEFT presses
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
